name: Australian Unity Limited
description: Australian Unity Limited is a national mutual organisation that provides health, wealth, and care services. Established in 1840 as Australia's first member-owned mutual wellbeing company, it offers health insurance, private health services, retirement living, aged care, and financial services including banking, financial planning, and investment management. The company operates with a focus on delivering community value and improving the wellbeing of its members and customers across Australia.
